title: Audit Chronik outcome export surface
goal: Audit the current Chronik repository and runtime/export surfaces to determine the safest source-grounded path for redacted operator.routing_outcome-style exports consumed by heimlern.

acceptance.assertion: Chronik git/PR/CI/runtime-relevant export surfaces are checked live before trusting prior summaries.
The audit identifies whether Chronik already has a suitable append-only event/export path or records the missing implementation surface.
The audit maps Chronik output candidates to heimlern OLA input requirements and records redaction, source identity and digest needs.
The audit performs no Chronik runtime mutation, no backfill and no policy application.

metadata.source_decision: Chronik selected as primary integration organ for heimlern because it owns append-only historical outcomes.
metadata.runtime_observation: Chronik user service was inactive; no listener or successful local health response was observed. No mutation was attempted.
findings: Chronik already provides append-only JSONL ingest and cursor export.
Heimlern owns a strict operator.routing_outcome.v1 payload contract.
The existing generic Heimlern Chronik consumer parses AussenEvent and is not suitable for routing outcomes.
Grabowski has lifecycle/friction receipts but no routing-outcome producer.
A separate Chronik transport envelope is required because the strict Heimlern payload cannot accept transport provenance fields.

verified_acceptance.chronik-live-state-checked: Git, open PRs, source surfaces and local user-service state were read live.
verified_acceptance.export-surface-boundary: The append-only transport exists; bounded envelope, typed consumer and producer were identified as missing.
verified_acceptance.heimlern-input-fit: The audit binds payload ownership to Heimlern and source/digest/freshness transport to a separate Chronik envelope.
verified_acceptance.no-runtime-mutation: No service start, backfill, ingest or policy application occurred.

metadata.outcome: Use Chronik as append-only transport, not payload authority; implement a digest-bound envelope, typed Heimlern consumer and later Grabowski producer.
